info.title: 1Club Platform API
info.description:
The 1Club Platform API lets you programmatically access and manage your organization's data.

## Authentication

All requests require a customer API key passed as a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer 1club_sk_live_...
```

Generate API keys from the admin portal under **Settings > API Tokens**.
The key is tied to your organization - all responses are scoped to your org's data.

## Rate Limiting

- **100 requests per minute** per organization
- When exceeded, the API returns `429 Too Many Requests` with a `Retry-After` header
- Rate limit headers are included in every response:
  - `X-RateLimit-Limit` - max requests per window
  - `X-RateLimit-Remaining` - requests remaining
  - `X-RateLimit-Reset` - seconds until the window resets

## Errors

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `400` | Invalid request parameters |
| `401` | Missing or invalid API key |
| `403` | API key is missing the required scope |
| `404` | Resource not found (or doesn't belong to your organization) |
| `429` | Rate limit exceeded |
| `500` | Internal server error |

tags.name: Classes
tags.description: Browse class schedules, pricing, and availability.

tags.name: Content
tags.description: Read published content (FAQs, posts, documents, blocks).

tags.name: Clubs
tags.description: Look up club details by slug.

customerApiAuth.description: Customer API key obtained from the admin portal (e.g. 1club_sk_live_...)

PlatformInstructor.description: Public instructor shape returned alongside classes.

bio.description: EditorJS document for the instructor bio.

PlatformClass.description: A class returned by the platform API, including scheduling, capacity, pricing (with tax), club/area context, instructors, and computed status fields.

price.description: Price including any applicable default tax.

translations.description: Per-locale translations keyed by language code (e.g. 'es', 'fr').

PlatformClub.description: A club with its address, contact info, amenities, sports, aggregated images, and average rating.

images.description: All images aggregated from the club and its active areas.

amenities.description: Raw amenity IDs stored on the club.

amenitiesResolved.description: Amenities resolved to display objects (id, name, locale-aware).

rating.description: Average and total of public reviews. Omitted when there are no public reviews.

socialProfiles.description: Map of social network keys (e.g. 'instagram') to profile URLs.

PlatformContent.description: A published content item (FAQ, post, document, or block) for the organization.

content.description: Body of the content item. May contain HTML, EditorJS blocks, a summary, and keywords.

PlatformTransaction.description: A billing transaction with amounts, payment status, and links to the originating booking or membership.

transactionType.description: TransactionType enum value (e.g. booking_creation, membership_creation, product_sale, membership_recurrence, etc.).

amount.description: Pre-tax amount. Serialized as a decimal string on the wire (e.g. "25.00") to preserve precision - parse rather than relying on JSON number behavior.

taxAmount.description: Tax portion. Serialized as a decimal string on the wire to preserve precision.

totalAmount.description: Total billed amount (amount + taxAmount). Serialized as a decimal string on the wire to preserve precision.

PlatformBooking.description: A booking created through the platform API. Recorded with a booking transaction so it counts for revenue, marked paid (settled against the External / API payment method) or unpaid (outstanding) per the caller. Refunds and collection stay with the caller.

amount.description: Recorded amount in the organization's currency

idempotentReplay.description: True when an existing booking was returned instead of creating a new one.

get.description: Returns all classes for the organization associated with the API token. Requires the `classes:read` scope.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter classes starting from this date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter classes ending before this date

403.description: API key is missing the required `classes:read` scope

get.description: Returns a single class. The class must belong to the organization associated with the API token. Requires the `classes:read` scope.

403.description: API key is missing the required `classes:read` scope

get.description: Returns club details including amenities, rating, and images. The club must belong to the organization associated with the API token. Requires the `clubs:read` scope.

403.description: API key is missing the required `clubs:read` scope

get.description: Returns published content for the organization. Optionally filter by type. Requires the `content:read` scope.

403.description: API key is missing the required `content:read` scope

get.description: Returns a single published content item by slug. Requires the `content:read` scope.

403.description: API key is missing the required `content:read` scope

get.description: Returns transactions for the organization associated with the API token, filtered by transaction creation time to a window of at most 24 hours and ordered by `createdAt` descending. When `startDate` and `endDate` are omitted, the window defaults to the last 24 hours (`endDate = now`, `startDate = now - 24h`). When only one of the two is provided, the other is derived from the 24-hour window. Transactions with `amount = 0` are excluded. Requires the `transactions:read` scope.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Inclusive lower bound on transaction `createdAt`. Defaults to `endDate - 24h`.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Inclusive upper bound on transaction `createdAt`. Defaults to `now`.

parameters.name: paymentStatus
parameters.description: Filter by payment status. When omitted, all statuses are returned.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return.

400.description: Invalid query parameters (e.g. malformed date, window > 24h)

403.description: API key is missing the required `transactions:read` scope

get.description: Returns a single transaction. The transaction must belong to the organization associated with the API token. Requires the `transactions:read` scope.

403.description: API key is missing the required `transactions:read` scope

post.description: Creates a booking on an area (e.g. a padel court) for a customer. The customer is matched to a contact by email (created if new). A booking transaction is recorded so it counts for revenue: `paid` marks it settled against the External / API payment method (no gateway call), `unpaid` leaves it outstanding. `amount` defaults to the area's price for the slot. Send an `Idempotency-Key` header to make retries safe — the same key returns the original booking (HTTP 200).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional key; a retried request with the same key returns the original booking

amount.description: Amount collected; defaults to the area's price for the slot

channel.description: Optional channel label, stored for attribution

200.description: Existing booking returned (idempotent replay of the Idempotency-Key)

400.description: Invalid request (outside operating hours, policy violation, or area not bookable)

403.description: API key is missing the required `bookings:write` scope

409.description: Area unavailable for the selected time, or the Idempotency-Key was reused for a different booking

get.description: Returns the organization's bookable areas (e.g. padel courts). Optionally filter by club or sport (e.g. `padel`). Use the returned area `id` as `areaId` when creating a booking.

parameters.name: clubId
parameters.description: Only return areas belonging to this club

parameters.name: sport
parameters.description: Only return areas whose area type lists this sport (e.g. "padel")

403.description: API key is missing the required `areas:read` scope

get.description: Returns the area's operating hours and the intervals already taken by non-cancelled bookings within the window, so you can compute open slots. 1Club remains the source of truth: booking creation re-checks availability atomically and rejects conflicts.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end (ISO date-time). At most 31 days after `from`.

403.description: API key is missing the required `areas:read` scope

post.description: Cancels the booking by its 1Club id. No refund is issued by 1Club — the caller owns refunds. Idempotent: cancelling an already-cancelled booking succeeds.

403.description: API key is missing the required `bookings:write` scope

get.description: Returns the current state of a booking (including payment status) by its 1Club id.

403.description: API key is missing the required `bookings:read` scope
